headline: 2 Reasons to Avoid BKR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Baker Hughes currently trades at $61.32 and has been a dream stock for shareholders. It’s returned 182% since April 2021, more than tripling the S&P 500’s 57.8% gain. The company has also beaten the index over the past six months as its stock price is up 26.8% thanks to its solid quarterly results.

headline: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From Baker Hughes' Report
summary: Baker Hughes will release its first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a single-digit bottom-line growth.
